---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Sift
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem

What can't you do right now that you'd like to? Or what workflow is harder than
it should be?

## Proposed Solution

How do you imagine this working? A CLI flag, a new command, a config option?
Rough sketches welcome.

## Why Sift?

This is a personal research tool — local-first, AI-assisted, focused on
discovery and synthesis. How does your request fit that scope?

## Alternative approaches

What else have you considered? A workaround, another tool, a different design?

## Additional context

Links to similar tools, relevant discussions, or anything else that helps
understand the request.
